mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ancient_physicians WHERE name LIKE '%${name}%';
mapper.update: UPDATE ancient_physicians SET name = #{name}, courtesy_name = #{courtesy_name}, other_name = #{other_name}, birth_date = #{birth_date}, death_date = #{death_date}, dynasty = #{dynasty}, birth_place = #{birth_place}, achievements = #{achievements}, works = #{works}, speciality = #{speciality}, publications = #{publications}, thumbnail = #{thumbnail}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
